name: service-oriented-vehicle-diagnostics
description: SOVD diagnostic foundation — local dev runner

scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "zonecontroller,someip-gw,sovdserver,frontend" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan,magenta,green" "node '$npm_execpath' run start:zone" "node '$npm_execpath' run start:someip-gw" "node '$npm_execpath' run start:sovd" "node '$npm_execpath' run start:ui"
scripts.start:ui: sleep 1 && exec node "$npm_execpath" run dev --prefix SovdClient
scripts.build: node "$npm_execpath" run build:doorecu && node "$npm_execpath" run build:sovdserver
